title: T1.1: Fix auth bypass — abort(401) in check_auth hook. In server.py:74-84, replace return with abort(401, ...). Files: server/tmux_status_server/server.py [fix-cycle-2, auth]

text: Acceptance: (1) check_auth calls abort(401, ...) instead of return. (2) Remove response.status = 401 and response.content_type lines since abort() handles status. abort is already imported at line 68. (3) All existing tests pass (update mocks if needed — hook now raises HTTPError instead of returning).
